name: Dr. Chidi Okoro
bio: Dr. Okoro specializes in minimally invasive arthroscopic surgery for athletes.

name: Dr. Amina Yusuf
bio: Expert in correcting congenital bone disorders and pediatric trauma.

name: Dr. Segun Adebayo
bio: A pioneer in robotic-assisted hip and knee surgery with over 2,000 successful procedures.

name: Dr. Funmi Bakare
bio: Specializes in complex spinal reconstructions and non-surgical management of chronic back pain.

name: Dr. Emeka Nwosu
bio: Dedicated to emergency orthopedic care, focusing on complex limb-salvage and fracture healing.

name: Dr. Tunde Fashola
bio: Focuses on post-operative rehabilitation and mobility recovery.

name: Dr. Ifeoma Azikiwe
bio: Expert in delicate nerve repairs and carpal tunnel treatments.

name: Dr. Babatunde Lawal
bio: Specializes in the surgical management of bone and soft tissue tumors.

name: Dr. Zainab Balogun
bio: Dedicated to managing autoimmune and inflammatory bone conditions.

name: Dr. Victor Obi
bio: Treats complex ankle fractures and reconstructive foot deformities.

name: Dr. Kelechi Iheanacho
bio: Expert in bone density optimization and geriatric fracture prevention.

name: Dr. Sarah Alabi
bio: Specializes in ACL reconstruction and shoulder stability in athletes.

name: Dr. Mohammed Danjuma
bio: Focuses on high-impact emergency orthopedic interventions.

name: Dr. Nneka Eze
bio: Leading expert in total knee and hip replacements in West Africa.

name: Dr. David Bello
bio: Passionate about non-surgical pain management and physical recovery.
